summary: Draft tracking PR for the mnname menu unit. The local PR dump contains no diff or changed files and the PR was closed unmerged, but the decomp.dev report recorded measurable progress for main/melee/mn/mnname: +3184 matched bytes overall, 10 newly fully matched items, and 13 additional partial improvements.

key_files.role: Reported decomp.dev unit with all new matches and partial improvements; no exact source file diff was present in the slice.

what_changed: The PR body was only 'Tracking PR as per usual', indicating this was used to measure decomp progress rather than provide an explanatory review-ready patch.
GitHub metadata shows the PR was draft, had 0 commits, 0 changed files, 0 additions, and 0 deletions in the captured slice.
decomp.dev reported GALE01 matched code moving to 59.80%, a +0.08% increase and +3184 bytes.

The bot reported 10 new 100% matches in main/melee/mn/mnname: mnName_80237D94, fn_8023A0BC, mnName_80239878, DeleteName, mnName_80238754, mnName_80238AE0, mnName_8023749C, IsNameListFull, mnName_GetColumnCount, and mnName_80238A04.

The bot reported 13 improvements in unmatched mnname items, including mnName_80238C34 to 91.83%, mnName_80239A24 to 87.36%, mnName_8023A59C to 91.48%, mnName_8023AC40 to 84.20%, mnName_MainInput to 91.87%, fn_80239574 to 99.92%, mnName_8023A290 to 97.24%, mnName_SortNames to 89.02%, mnName_8023A9B4 to 97.09%, mnName_ConfirmNameDeleteInput to 96.24%, CompareNameStrings to 95.71%, .bss to 71.43%, and .sdata2 to 88.89%.
smart_moves: Used a tracking PR to get an automated decomp.dev GALE01 progress report for the mnname work before any merge.
The progress report separated fully matched functions from partial improvements, making it easy to identify near-finished targets such as fn_80239574 at 99.92% and mnName_8023A290 at 97.24%.
decomp_lessons: When a PR has no captured diff, the decomp.dev report can still preserve useful target lists and match percentages for future work.

For mnname, future contributors should prioritize the high-percent partials reported here because several were already close to matching: fn_80239574, mnName_8023A290, mnName_8023A9B4, mnName_ConfirmNameDeleteInput, and CompareNameStrings.

Closed unmerged tracking PRs are weak evidence for implementation details; reuse only the reported symbol names, unit, match percentages, and byte deltas unless the original branch or diff can be recovered.
naming_conventions: Most unresolved or address-based mnname symbols use the `mnName_` prefix followed by either a descriptive suffix or an address, e.g. `mnName_MainInput`, `mnName_SortNames`, `mnName_ConfirmNameDeleteInput`, and `mnName_80238C34`.
Some functions in this unit already had descriptive PascalCase names without the `mnName_` prefix, including `DeleteName`, `IsNameListFull`, and `CompareNameStrings`.
Generic placeholder functions retained the `fn_` address form, as seen with `fn_8023A0BC` and `fn_80239574`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No diff excerpt or review comments were available, so no concrete C/assembly matching tactic can be attributed to this PR.

The bot report suggests incremental matching across both code and data sections, with `.bss` and `.sdata2` also improving, but the slice does not show the data declarations or layout changes responsible.
review_feedback: No human review comments were captured.
The PR was closed without merge and contains no changed files in the dump, so there is no reviewer guidance to preserve.
follow_up_queries: Find later merged PRs touching main/melee/mn/mnname that include the symbols reported here.
Search for mnName_MainInput, mnName_SortNames, mnName_ConfirmNameDeleteInput, and CompareNameStrings in subsequent PRs to recover the actual matching tactics.
Check whether the jj/mnname branch or nearby commits contain the missing diff for the progress reported by decomp.dev.
